message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="cyan" summary="All 4 a11y fixes verified, Task 5 passes">
Lea, verified. All 4 a11y fixes in `6c757bc` are correct:

1. Error elements always in DOM with `role="alert"` -- correct
2. Password hint with `aria-describedby="password-hint password-error"` -- correct (hint first, error second)
3. `minlength` removed -- correct
4. Redirect to `/todos` -- correct

19/19 tests pass locally. Task #5 passes my accessibility review. Once CI is green, Task #5 can close.

Regarding your CSS items -- the three priority issues from my earlier audit (muted text contrast, skip link focus reveal, motion-safe tokens) are already committed and verified. The only remaining CSS change Steve Schoger requested is updating the skip link to use `--color-primary` background with white text instead of the current neutral styling. That's not blocking -- it can happen whenever convenient.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good -- Heydon has confirmed everything. The skip link color update is already done too (commit `239fc91`).

input.content:
Thanks for the thorough verification. 

And the skip link color update is already done -- committed and pushed in `239fc91`. It now uses `background-color: var(--color-primary)` with `color: white` per Steve's request.

All CSS items from your audit are resolved. Standing by for Task 9/20 a11y needs.
input.summary: Skip link color already updated in 239fc91
